_meta.description: Section compliance reference input nodes. 21 inputs injected from the Reference model via REF_OUTPUT_TO_TARGET_INPUT mapping in SectionComplianceNodes.js. These enable per-section compliance ratio calculations by comparing Target model values against Reference model values. Grouped by section: S07 water heating (4), S09 internal gains (3), S12 air tightness (2), S11 envelope RSI (5), S11 envelope U-values (6), S11 thermal bridge (1).

s07_waterHeating.label: Reference Water Use (L/person/day)
s07_waterHeating.note: Reference litres per person per day for DHW demand. Mapped from Reference output waterHeating.lpppd.

s07_waterHeating.label: Reference Warm Water Fraction
s07_waterHeating.note: Reference warm water fraction (lpppd * 0.4). Mapped from Reference output waterHeating.warmWaterFraction.

s07_waterHeating.label: Reference Water Heating Efficiency (%)
s07_waterHeating.note: Reference water heating efficiency. 300% indicates heat pump baseline. Mapped from Reference output waterHeating.efficiency.

s07_waterHeating.label: Reference DWHR Efficiency (%)
s07_waterHeating.note: Reference drain water heat recovery efficiency. Default 0 = no DWHR in reference. Mapped from Reference output waterHeating.dwhrEfficiency.

s09_internalGains.label: Reference Plug Load Density (W/m²)
s09_internalGains.note: Reference plug load power density. Mapped from Reference output internal.plugLoadDensity.

s09_internalGains.label: Reference Lighting Density (W/m²)
s09_internalGains.note: Reference lighting power density. Mapped from Reference output internal.lightingDensity.

s09_internalGains.label: Reference Equipment Density (W/m²)
s09_internalGains.note: Reference equipment power density. Mapped from Reference output internal.equipmentDensity.

s12_airTightness.label: Reference ACH50
s12_airTightness.note: Reference air changes per hour at 50Pa. Mapped from Reference output airTightness.ach50Target.

s12_airTightness.label: Reference ELA10 (m²)
s12_airTightness.note: Reference equivalent leakage area at 10Pa. Mapped from Reference output airTightness.ela10.

s11_envelopeRSI.label: Reference Roof RSI
s11_envelopeRSI.note: Reference roof/ceiling thermal resistance. Mapped from Reference output transmissionLoss.roof.rsi.

s11_envelopeRSI.label: Reference Walls RSI
s11_envelopeRSI.note: Reference walls above grade thermal resistance. Mapped from Reference output transmissionLoss.walls.rsi.

s11_envelopeRSI.label: Reference Exposed Floor RSI
s11_envelopeRSI.note: Reference exposed floor thermal resistance. Mapped from Reference output transmissionLoss.exposedFloor.rsi.

s11_envelopeRSI.label: Reference Walls Below Grade RSI
s11_envelopeRSI.note: Reference walls below grade thermal resistance. Mapped from Reference output transmissionLoss.wallsBelowGrade.rsi.

s11_envelopeRSI.label: Reference Slab on Grade RSI
s11_envelopeRSI.note: Reference slab on grade thermal resistance. Mapped from Reference output transmissionLoss.slabOnGrade.rsi.

s11_envelopeUValues.label: Reference Doors U-Value
s11_envelopeUValues.note: Reference doors thermal transmittance. Mapped from Reference output transmissionLoss.doors.uValue.

s11_envelopeUValues.label: Reference Window North U-Value
s11_envelopeUValues.note: Reference north window thermal transmittance. Mapped from Reference output transmissionLoss.windowNorth.uValue.

s11_envelopeUValues.label: Reference Window East U-Value
s11_envelopeUValues.note: Reference east window thermal transmittance. Mapped from Reference output transmissionLoss.windowEast.uValue.

s11_envelopeUValues.label: Reference Window South U-Value
s11_envelopeUValues.note: Reference south window thermal transmittance. Mapped from Reference output transmissionLoss.windowSouth.uValue.

s11_envelopeUValues.label: Reference Window West U-Value
s11_envelopeUValues.note: Reference west window thermal transmittance. Mapped from Reference output transmissionLoss.windowWest.uValue.

s11_envelopeUValues.label: Reference Skylights U-Value
s11_envelopeUValues.note: Reference skylights thermal transmittance. Mapped from Reference output transmissionLoss.skylights.uValue.

s11_thermalBridge.label: Reference Thermal Bridge Penalty (%)
s11_thermalBridge.note: Reference thermal bridge penalty percentage. Mapped from Reference output transmissionLoss.thermalBridgePenalty.

signature.inputs: These ARE the inputs (21 total, registered via graph.registerInput loop over ReferenceInputs array in SectionComplianceNodes.js). Populated by REF_OUTPUT_TO_TARGET_INPUT mapping.
signature.output: Values stored in Target model's MultiModelState, consumed by per-section compliance ratio and pass/fail computations

invariants.condition: Non-zero defaults represent code minimum baselines
invariants.description: lpppd=40, warmWaterFraction=16, efficiency=300%, plugLoad=7, lighting=1.5, equipment=3, ach50=1.5, RSI=5, U-value=2, thermalBridge=20%

invariants.condition: RSI compliance: target/ref (higher RSI = better insulation = pass when ratio >= 100%)
invariants.description: RSI ratio nodes use target/ref pattern; pass when target >= ref

invariants.condition: U-value compliance: ref/target INVERTED (lower U-value = better insulation = pass when ratio >= 100%)
invariants.description: U-value ratio nodes use ref/target pattern; pass when target <= ref

invariants.condition: Thermal bridge compliance: ref/target INVERTED (lower penalty = better = pass when ratio >= 100%)
invariants.description: Thermal bridge ratio uses ref/target; pass when target <= ref

behavior.condition: Reference model computes and REF_OUTPUT_TO_TARGET_INPUT copies values
behavior.output: Target model recomputes section compliance ratios and pass/fail nodes
behavior.note: 21 reference inputs drive 40+ compliance ratio (m_*) and pass/fail (n_*) computed nodes

behavior.output: 4 ratio nodes: m_49 (water use), m_50 (warm water), m_52 (efficiency), m_53 (DWHR)
behavior.note: m_53 returns 'N/A' when ref DWHR=0; others use target/ref pattern

behavior.output: 3 ratio + 3 pass/fail nodes: m/n_65 (plugLoad), m/n_66 (lighting), m/n_67 (equipment)
behavior.note: Pass when target/ref <= 1.0 (lower density is better)

behavior.output: 5 ratio + 5 pass/fail nodes: m/n_85 (roof), m/n_86 (walls), m/n_87 (exposedFloor), m/n_94 (wallsBelowGrade), m/n_95 (slabOnGrade)
behavior.note: Pass when target RSI >= ref RSI (more insulation is better)

behavior.output: 6 ratio + 6 pass/fail nodes: m/n_88 (doors), m/n_89-92 (windowN/E/S/W), m/n_93 (skylights)
behavior.note: INVERTED ratio: ref/target. Pass when target U-value <= ref U-value (less heat loss is better)
INVERTED ratio: ref/target. Pass when target penalty <= ref penalty
ACH50: INVERTED ref/target with 0.5% tolerance. ELA10: target/ref with 0.5% tolerance.

edgeCases.handling: Most ratios return '100%' or '0%'; DWHR ratio (m_53) returns 'N/A'
edgeCases.rationale: Guard against division by zero; N/A for DWHR because ref=0 means no DWHR requirement

edgeCases.condition: Non-zero defaults differ from other reference input files
edgeCases.handling: These defaults are code minimum baselines (lpppd=40, efficiency=300%, ach50=1.5, etc.) not zero
edgeCases.rationale: Enables meaningful compliance comparison even before Reference model computes

references.source: SectionComplianceNodes.js (ReferenceInputs array, 21 entries registered via loop)
